rows.label: xs33530100_MSG0020
rows.name:
I honestly thought about going
out to look for you myself, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33530100_MSG0030
rows.name: unfortunately, my Doll gave out on me[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33530100_MSG0035
rows.name:
So I figured I'd take shelter
here for the time being.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33530100_MSG0050
rows.name: Haha. As always, you never disappoint.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33530100_MSG0065
rows.name:
Time to turn the tables[ST:wide ]— from
here on, it's our turn.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33530100_MSG0070
rows.name:
Let's show that bastard
Void what we're made of![ST:wait ]
